message:
test(conformance): add dlfcn, grp, pwd conformance harnesses

Adds fixture validation tests for:
- dlfcn_ops: dlopen, dlsym, dlclose, dlerror (11 tests)
- grp_ops: getgrnam, getgrgid, setgrent/endgrent (12 tests)
- pwd_ops: getpwnam, getpwuid, setpwent/endpwent (12 tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
